description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet, predominantly yellow with bold red trim and black front and rear panels. The side panels feature large, colorful artwork depicting the iconic Pac-Man character being chased by a ghost, with a stylized maze motif in the background. The front face includes a control panel with a red joystick and two white buttons, positioned below a large, vertically oriented screen displaying the Pac-Man game. Above the screen is a marquee with the 'PAC-MAN' logo in bright yellow and red, flanked by additional character graphics. The cabinet is constructed from wood or particleboard, with a glossy painted finish and metal or plastic trim for durability. The overall design is both functional and visually striking, intended to attract players in public spaces.
description: A classic upright Pac-Man arcade cabinet with yellow side panels, red trim, and vibrant character artwork. The front features a control panel, screen, and a marquee with the Pac-Man logo.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the large Pac-Man and ghost artwork on a yellow background, with the cabinet's angled profile and red trim visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the control panel with joystick and buttons, the game screen, and the illuminated Pac-Man marquee at the top.
description_view_2: Right side view, nearly identical to the left, with the same Pac-Man and ghost artwork and angled cabinet shape.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain black panel with red trim, lacking any artwork or interactive features.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, vertically oriented, medium size with a slightly curved surface and a visible bezel.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Single-player layout with one red joystick and two white buttons, arranged in a simple horizontal row on a black panel with red trim.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the 'PAC-MAN' logo in yellow and red, with Pac-Man and ghost characters on a white background, matching the game's playful theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Large, colorful artwork depicting Pac-Man and a ghost, with a stylized maze and yellow background, outlined in red.
